method: Token-weighted fraction of greedy emissions (unpruned int4 argmax) that fall OUTSIDE a vocab subset. NOT a gate criterion: the served-vs-served greedy gate passes 128/128 by construction (a pruned model's argmax is always in kept). This quantifies (a) fidelity drift vs the unpruned model and (b) the private-PPL clip risk.

heldout_decode.source: heldout_int4_argmax.jsonl (unpruned int4 greedy, prompts disjoint from public 128)

public_decode_vs_shipped_set.note: authoritative: measured public greedy emissions outside the ACTUAL shipped kept set

irreducible_floor.desc: emissions outside the ENTIRE available corpus union (broad MMLU-Pro + all public GT target/context + specials). These argmax tokens never appear in any source corpus, so NO frequency selection at ANY K can capture them -- the hard floor on greedy fidelity.

residual_risk: Private PPL: a private GT-target token outside kept -> -inf logit -> +inf PPL on a private re-run. The shipped set hard-includes only the PUBLIC GT-target; the private set is unseen. Not closable locally; only a gated HF job on the private set confirms it.
